title: User Manual: Forest Clearance Mobile App
introduction: The Forest Clearance Mobile App is designed to help you access and manage forest clearance proposals on-the-go. This app allows you to view proposal status, track timelines, and receive important notifications, making it easier for you to stay on top of your work. With this app, you can make timely decisions and take action from anywhere.
purpose: You'll use this app to streamline your work with forest clearance proposals, ensuring you stay informed and up-to-date on the latest developments. This will help you prioritize your tasks and meet deadlines more efficiently.
